title: The Christmas Workshop 71950 300 Warm White LED Chaser Christmas Lights/Indoor or Outdoor Fairy Lights / 20.9 Metres / 8 Light Modes/Great for Christmas, Weddings & Gardens
features: CLASSIC CHRISTMAS LIGHTS – This set of warm white Christmas lights provides all the colourful illumination you need to decorate your home this festive season!

ENERGY EFFICIENT - These electrical Christmas chaser lights won't cost a fortune to run, and based on the October energy price cap of 34p p/kWh will cost you around 0.0012p per hour, which equates to just 5 pence per week, based on the lights being left on for a full 6 hours a night!

INDOOR/OUTDOOR LIGHTS – These multi-functional chaser lights are perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. Decorate your Christmas tree, living rooms & conservatories, or the outside of your home with ease.
8 SEPARATE LIGHT EFFECTS – Choose from Combination, Sequential, Chaser Flashing, Twinkle Flashing, Waves, Slow Glow, Slow Fade and Steady On to create the perfect festive ambience to suit your needs.

MAINS OPERATED – These festive Christmas lights are mains operated, and feature a 5-metre gap between the power source and the 20.9 metres of LED lights. If the lights are to be used outdoors for safety the transformer and power box need to remain protected indoors at all times.
description: From the manufacturer The Christmas Workshop LED Chaser Christmas Lights Various Colours & Sizes Illuminate your home with these beautiful LED Chaser Lights from The Christmas Workshop! With a massive selection available of all kinds of different colours and sizes, you're sure to find the perfect set of string lights for any occasion. All sets of these lights are mains operated, coming with a 5 metre lead wire to allow you to place them anywhere indoors or outdoors. The sizes range from 6.9 metres of lighting with 100 LEDs, all the way up to 69.9 metres of lighting with 1000 LEDs. All of the lights are energy efficient thanks to the LED technology, allowing you to run them throughout each evening without it costing you a lot of money. Let your lights shine each night for that magical Christmas feeling! KEY FEATURES: 9 Different Colours Up to 7 Sizes Indoors or Outdoors Suitable 8 Light Modes Great for All Celebrations 8 LIGHT MODES Push the button on the power outlet to change the lights between 1 of 8 settings! Choose from combination, sequential, chaser flashing, twinkle flashing, waves, slow glow, slow fade, and steady on. VARIOUS COLOUR OPTIONS Light up your home in all different colours! Choose from warm white, bright white, multicoloured, blue, pink, purple, and more. OUTDOORS SUITABLE Decorate indoors or outdoors with these lights, as they are water and weather resistant with an IP44 waterproof certification. However, please ensure that the power source is kept dry indoors at all times.
